description: Sync Miro boards, sticky notes, cards, shapes, and text items into your Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.help: The Client ID from your Miro developer app (Miro Profile → Settings → Your apps → Create App).

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.help: The Client Secret from your Miro developer app. Keep this private.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: OAuth2 redirect URI. Must match exactly what is registered in your Miro app settings.

resources.name: boards
resources.description: Miro whiteboard boards with metadata (name, description, access policy, owner, team).

resources.name: board_items
resources.description: Items on each board: sticky notes, cards, shapes, text, frames, and images.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync all Miro boards and their items.

apis.name: List Boards
apis.description: Return all boards accessible to the token, following cursor pagination.

apis.name: List Board Items
apis.description: Return all items on a board, following cursor pagination.

apis.name: Get Board
apis.description: Retrieve a single Miro board by ID.

name: MiroConnector
